revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初七]][[zh:二月初七]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 7|qq=February 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|啓明天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Keitai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 25th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|531|en|531|qid=Q32871|lt=531|1=531}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – Emperor Keitai abdicated by Zenjō, and the 27th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Ankan|en|Emperor Ankan|qid=Q241765|lt=Ankan Tennō|1=Emperor Ankan}}, ascended (citation needed). * {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|qid=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku|1=Ōtoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1084|en|1084|qid=Q19457|lt=1084|1=1084}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – Due to the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja|黄檗隠令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Eihō|en|Eihō|qid=Q1193881|lt=Eihō|1=Eihō}} to {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|qid=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku|1=Ōtoku}}. * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|qid=Q1194250|lt=Genryaku|1=Genryaku}} 1st year / {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|qid=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1184|en|1184|qid=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – In the battle of {{ill|Battle of Ichi-no-Tani|en|Battle of Ichi-no-Tani|qid=Q2116658|lt=Hichiya no Tatakai|1=Battle of Ichi-no-Tani}}, Minamoto no Yoshitsune and his allies achieved a decisive victory against the Taira Clan through a surprise attack known as the "Hisame-goshi no Kisetsu." * {{ill|En'ō|en|En'ō|qid=Q1193942|lt=En'ō|1=En'ō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1239|en|1239|qid=Q5434|lt=1239|1=1239}} {{ill|March 13|en|March 13|qid=Q2400|lt=March 13|1=March 13}}) – Due to successive heavenly phenomena, the era name was changed from {{ill|Ryakunin|en|Ryakunin|qid=Q1193948|lt=Reki Nin|1=Ryakunin}} to {{ill|En'ō|en|En'ō|qid=Q1193942|lt=En'ō|1=En'ō}}. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|qid=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|qid=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – The shogun, {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|qid=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}}, established the {{ill|Gokoku-ji|en|Gokoku-ji|qid=Q1534481|lt=Gokoku-ji|1=Gokoku-ji}} in honor of his mother, Katsura Shōin. * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1690|en|1690|qid=Q7678|lt=1690|1=1690}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – The completion of {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|qid=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō|1=Yushima Seidō}}, a temple dedicated to Confucius, took place. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|March 13|en|March 13|qid=Q2400|lt=March 13|1=March 13}}) – {{ill|Sanjō Sanetomi|en|Sanjō Sanetomi|qid=Q516646|lt=Sanjō Jitsumi|1=Sanjō Sanetomi}}, a member of the Sonnō jōi faction and a kugyō (noble) (died {{ill|1891|en|1891|qid=Q7837|lt=1891|1=1891}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|啓明天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Keitai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 25th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|531|en|531|qid=Q32871|lt=531|1=531}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – Emperor Keitai, the 26th Emperor of Japan (as recorded in the Nihon Shoki). * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|qid=Q1194250|lt=Genryaku|1=Genryaku}} 1st year / {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|qid=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1184|en|1184|qid=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – Both {{ill|Taira no Atsumori|en|Taira no Atsumori|qid=Q2284163|lt=Taira Atsumori|1=Taira no Atsumori}}, a military commander and son of Taira no Tadanori, and {{ill|Taira no Tadanori|en|Taira no Tadanori|qid=Q713107|lt=Taira Tadatoki|1=Taira no Tadanori}}, a military commander and son of Taira no Tadamori, died. (Birth years: Atsumori: unknown; Tadatoki: 1144.) * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1694|en|1694|qid=Q7694|lt=1694|1=1694}} {{ill|March 2|en|March 2|qid=Q2390|lt=March 2|1=March 2}}) – {{ill|Mōri Yoshitsugu|ja|毛利吉就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Yoshitsugu|1=Mōri Yoshinari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11547586}}, the lord of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1668|en|1668|qid=Q7595|lt=1668|1=1668}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1731|en|1731|qid=Q6963|lt=1731|1=1731}} {{ill|March 14|en|March 14|qid=Q2404|lt=March 14|1=March 14}}) – {{ill|Kagami Shikō|en|Kagami Shikō|qid=Q1721089|lt=Kakami Shikakō|1=Kagami Shikō}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born {{ill|1665|en|1665|qid=Q7582|lt=1665|1=1665}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|6|2|8|1|7|3|2|0207|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 7일]] [[ja:2月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初七]]
[[ar:February 7 (Lunisolar)]]
